Great.
Yeah, I think that covers it.
I think for next week, if you can let us know what's the status of like the technical SEO fixes, reviewing the content ideas, and then also the calibration article.
The sooner you can update the calibration article, the faster we can publish it on the blog.
I know that when we did the CMS review with Mario, one of the issues she mentioned was that it typically takes around three hours to publish an article just based on the current process.
We've actually internally set
We're workflow where we're going to automate that and hopefully drop that three hours down to much lower.
So we're still working that process.
But that calibration article will be our first test of that workflow.
So the faster you can review the article and then the faster we publish it, that will be really important.
Quick question about the review.
What are you looking for?
Is it just like factual?
I mean, because I know you've already done a lot of things to make it geo-friendly.
So what should we be editing?
Mostly for tone and voice, whether or not when you're reading it, does it sound like Netwix?
Does it sound like good content that you wouldn't hesitate to put someone's name on it?
And actually, when we refer to the name, I forgot to ask, do we want a specific author for these blogs that we're generating, or do we want them to be generic?
to rosy?
I think we may have answered that before, but I just wanted to confirm here.
From the SEO geo perspective, it's crucial to have authoritative source for a blog post.
Yeah, so I think we'll need to figure out a process to identify one of the Netwrix's authors to tie to these articles.
I think that this first one will be relatively easy because it's a refresh of the current blog, but as we go through additional topics, we'll need to do that.

Yeah, so Muriel has a bench of people that have agreed to be authors, and so I think based on that bench strength, I think we can just give you a table that says, hey, this person is good for this type of article.
Muriel should be able to connect the dots for you there.
Perfect, and I'll make sure to do two things on our part.
Make sure that Muriel's included in this meeting, and then to add her.
Yeah.
Bill, I'm also thinking in the interest of, I don't mind having an extra person in the mix.
I think it may make sense to have Ralph as well.
Yeah, that's what I thought about too.
Yeah, I agree.
We'll get you Ralph's contact information.
I think he's already in Notion.
I think you've been in touch.
But we should just get him included as well.
Okay, perfect.
Great, well.
For my quick understanding, I want to make sure I know where these documents are.
You mentioned like the article you wanted to look at.
I don't see it here.
Is there a different way to be looking for this stuff?
Yes, actually.
I will include this in our notes in Notion.
But if you go to this Notion page, that's the agenda for today.
And the links are there.
Specifically, the link to the calibration article is this one here, John.
Here you go.
Go to the meeting and go to here.
Yes.
Sorry, did that not work?
Yeah.
Yeah.
Oh, it was.
Seeing a point or anything, but I, okay, so it'd be, it'd be this blog right here.
Exactly.
Kathy, if you don't mind, if it's not so much of a imposition, we, we were working with a agency building the website and, and, and got into really good operating rhythm there.
We're in just so many different tools.

I think one thing that would be great if you don't mind is when there are very specific action items, if we can just drop those in a, in a bulleted list in, in Slack, in the, in the, you know, group thread, I think that would just be a great way to make sure we're not missing something and that we, you know, we know exactly what needs to get done.
So if you're, if you're okay with that, I would just love to have one definitive source of truth of what we have to get done.
And that way we all know where to look.
Perfect.
Right after my next meeting, I'm going to add these notes and it'll be in a short summarize list in, in, in Notion, in Slack, I mean.
In Slack.
Yeah.
Great.
Thank you very much.
Appreciate it.
Great.
Thanks so much.
I really appreciate it.
Everyone's time.
then I will be out for the next two weeks, but Aida will be, Aida will always be here.
And we'll continue, hopefully, with the progress.
thanks so much.
Thank you.
a great weekend.
Thanks, team.
Bye.
Thank you.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, review initial deliverables, and define next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Urgency:** Netwrix needs to scale content production immediately to counter declining organic traffic and reduced PPC spend.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** The content strategy will be rebalanced to reflect Netwrix's revenue mix (2/3 data security, 1/3 identity security) by expanding the Data Security cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [**AI Focus:** AI-related risks (e.g., shadow AI, data exposure to LLMs) are a critical pain point and will be added as a key content theme.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**Production Blockers:** A 3-hour article publishing process and a lack of approved topics are delaying production. GrowthX will test an automated workflow to fix this.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=2496.0)

## Topics

### Urgency & Production Blockers

  - [**Problem:** Organic traffic is declining while PPC budget is reduced, creating pressure to scale content production rapidly.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Blocker 1: Topic Approval:** Production is blocked by a lack of approved topics. The goal is a backlog of 20–40 approved topics to enable scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [**Blocker 2: Publishing Workflow:** The current process takes \~3 hours per article. GrowthX will test an automated workflow with the first calibration article to reduce this time.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=2496.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [**Data Security Cluster (Cluster 1):**](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Problem:** The initial plan was too narrow, focusing only on DSPM.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [**Solution:** Expand the cluster to cover all core data security pillars:](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
          - [Data Security Posture Management (DSPM)](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
          - [Data Loss Prevention (DLP)](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
          - [Data Classification](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
          - [Data Access Governance](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
          - [AI Governance (cross-cutting)](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [**Security Use Cases Cluster (Cluster 4):**](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [**Problem:** The initial subclusters (identity-based attacks, insider threat, ransomware) were too broad.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [**Solution:** Add AI-related risks as a key sub-cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
          - [**Key Topics:** Shadow AI, data exposure to LLMs, agentic identity governance.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
          - [**Rationale:** These topics address a critical, emerging pain point for mid-market companies.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [**Persona Validation:**](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [**Action:** Have Ian (Netwrix) review the personas for accuracy, as the current team lacks frequent customer meeting exposure.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensures the content strategy is built on a solid understanding of customer pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)

### Deliverables & Tools

  - [**Calibration Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
      - [A refresh of a low-ranking blog with high search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Calibrate voice and tone. Netwrix team to review for brand fit, not factual accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=2542.0)
  - [**Technical SEO Audit:**](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Findings:** 404 pages, slow site speed, broken redirects, structured data errors.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Action:** Netwrix's SEO team to address. Note: VWO A/B testing is a known cause of performance drag.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:**](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Track content performance (traffic, engagement, LLM discoverability).](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
      - [**Status:** GrowthX to provide access links in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
  - [**Check That Dashboard (LLM Visibility):**](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Track Netwrix's "share of voice" in LLM results against competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
      - [**Status:** Internal only; Netwrix will get access in February.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Remove Okta from the competitor list; add DLP-focused competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=2483.0)
      - [Add Mariel and Ralph (Netwrix SEO team) to the meeting invite.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [Update the Data Security content cluster in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [Share links to the Looker dashboard and calibration article in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
      - [Post a summary of action items in the Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=2706.0)
  - [**Netwrix Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=2483.0)
      - [Review the calibration article for voice and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=2542.0)
      - [Have Ian review the customer personas.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [Assign the SEO team (Ralph, Ani) to review and approve topics in the content calendar by next Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
      - [Provide a list of DLP-focused competitors to add to the Check That dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
      - [Share Netwrix's internal keyword research and content calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/jPUi1PNjtKr2XKXLGXz-B6zPXvE6Nj-g?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
